'''Dix'thaar''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], host to a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] cell during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
